jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Cash App Pay Risk Platform

location.name: San Francisco, CA, United States of America

jobs.content:
About the role

Own the Cash App Pay risk-platform rules engine across the merchant-acceptance hot path so consumers can pay at millions of US merchants with sub-second decisioning and chargeback-rate floors below 5 bps.

  • JVM / Kafka / risk-rules-engine experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Trust & Safety — Square Seller Marketplace Integrity
jobs.content: Own the Square seller marketplace integrity motion across merchant-application review, payment-volume abuse signals, and the AfterPay BNPL-eligibility surface to keep the Block ecosystem safe for sellers, buyers, and AfterPay shoppers.
